creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
portmgr@ gave permission/instruction to revert this commit here [1].
Corresponding commit here [2].

Apologies for not having added the PR in the commit message. Added "manually" to the ports-commit e-mail here [3].

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/dev-commits-ports-all/2024-February/101285.html
[2] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=8afc025fce0515db8e4c6440aa780ff9737af7ce
[3] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/dev-commits-ports-all/2024-February/101442.html
